member.name: T:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogChannelConfiguration
member.summary: Provides an abstract base class for configuration of virtual analog channels in DAQmx operators.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogChannelConfiguration.ChannelName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name to assign to the local created virtual channel. If not specified, the physical channel name will be used.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogChannelConfiguration.MinimumValue
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying the minimum value to measure or generate, in the specified voltage units.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogChannelConfiguration.MaximumValue
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying the maximum value to measure or generate, in the specified voltage units.

member.name: T:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogInput
member.summary: Represents an operator that generates a sequence of voltage measurements from one or more DAQmx analog input channels.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogInput.SignalSource
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional source terminal of the clock. If not specified, the internal clock of the device will be used.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogInput.SampleRate
member.summary: Gets or sets the sampling rate for acquiring voltage measurements, in samples per second.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogInput.ActiveEdge
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying on which edge of a clock pulse sampling takes place.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogInput.SampleMode
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying whether the acquisition task will acquire a finite number of samples or if it continuously acquires samples.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogInput.BufferSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of samples to acquire, for finite samples, or the size of the buffer for continuous sampling.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogInput.SamplesPerChannel
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of samples per channel in each output buffer. If not specified, the number of samples will be set to the size of the buffer.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogInput.Channels
member.summary: Gets the collection of analog input channels from which to acquire voltage samples.

member.name: M:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogInput.Generate
member.summary: Generates an observable sequence of voltage measurements from one or more DAQmx analog input channels.
member.returns: A sequence of 2D objects storing the voltage samples. Each row corresponds to a channel in the acquisition task, and each column to a sample from each of the channels. The order of the channels follows the order in which you specify the channels in the property.

member.name: M:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogInput.Generate``1(System.IObservable{``0})
member.summary: Generates an observable sequence of voltage measurements from one or more DAQmx analog input channels, where each new buffer is emitted only when an observable sequence emits a notification.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements in the sequence.
member.param: The sequence containing the notifications used for emitting sample buffers.
member.returns: A sequence of 2D objects storing the voltage samples. Each row corresponds to a channel in the acquisition task, and each column to a sample from each of the channels. The order of the channels follows the order in which you specify the channels in the property.

member.name: T:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogInputChannelConfiguration
member.summary: Represents the configuration of a virtual analog input channel in DAQmx operators.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogInputChannelConfiguration.PhysicalChannel
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the physical channel used to create the local virtual channel.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogInputChannelConfiguration.TerminalConfiguration
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying the terminal configuration for the channel.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogInputChannelConfiguration.VoltageUnits
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying the units used to return voltage measurements from the channel.

member.name: T:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogOutput
member.summary: Represents an operator that generates voltage signals in one or more DAQmx analog output channels from a sequence of sample buffers.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogOutput.SignalSource
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional source terminal of the clock. If not specified, the internal clock of the device will be used.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogOutput.SampleRate
member.summary: Gets or sets the sampling rate for generating voltage signals, in samples per second.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogOutput.ActiveEdge
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying on which edge of a clock pulse sampling takes place.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogOutput.SampleMode
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying whether the signal generation task will generate a finite number of samples or if it continuously generates samples.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogOutput.BufferSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of samples to generate, for finite samples, or the size of the buffer for continuous signal generation.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogOutput.Channels
member.summary: Gets the collection of analog output channels used to generate voltage signals.

member.name: M:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogOutput.Process(System.IObservable{System.Double})
member.summary: Generates a voltage signal in one or more DAQmx analog output channels from an observable sequence of samples.
member.param: A sequence of floating-point numbers representing the samples used to generate voltage signals.
member.returns: An observable sequence that is identical to the sequence but where there is an additional side effect of generating voltage signals in one or more DAQmx analog output channels.

member.name: M:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogOutput.Process(System.IObservable{OpenCV.Net.Mat})
member.summary: Generates voltage signals in one or more DAQmx analog output channels from an observable sequence of sample buffers.
member.param: A sequence of 2D objects storing the voltage samples. Each row corresponds to one of the channels in the signal generation task, and each column to a sample from each of the channels. The order of the channels follows the order in which you specify the channels in the property.
member.returns: An observable sequence that is identical to the sequence but where there is an additional side effect of generating voltage signals in one or more DAQmx analog output channels.

member.name: T:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogOutputChannelConfiguration
member.summary: Represents the configuration of a virtual analog output channel in DAQmx operators.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogOutputChannelConfiguration.PhysicalChannel
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the physical channel used to create the local virtual channel.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.AnalogOutputChannelConfiguration.VoltageUnits
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying in what units to generate voltage on the channel.

member.name: T:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalChannelConfiguration
member.summary: Provides an abstract base class for configuration of virtual digital channels in DAQmx operators.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalChannelConfiguration.ChannelName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name to assign to the local created virtual channel. If not specified, the physical channel name will be used.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalChannelConfiguration.Grouping
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying how to group digital lines into one or more virtual channels.

member.name: T:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalInput
member.summary: Represents an operator that reads a sequence of logical values from one or more DAQmx digital input lines.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalInput.SignalSource
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional source terminal of the clock. If not specified, the internal clock of the device will be used.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalInput.SampleRate
member.summary: Gets or sets the sampling rate for reading logical values, in samples per second.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalInput.ActiveEdge
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying on which edge of a clock pulse sampling takes place.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalInput.SampleMode
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying whether the acquisition task will acquire a finite number of samples or if it continuously acquires samples.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalInput.BufferSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of samples to acquire, for finite samples, or the size of the buffer for continuous sampling.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalInput.SamplesPerChannel
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of samples per channel in each output buffer. If not specified, the number of samples will be set to the size of the buffer.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalInput.Channels
member.summary: Gets the collection of virtual input channels from which to read logical values.

member.name: M:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalInput.Generate
member.summary: Reads an observable sequence of logical values from one or more DAQmx digital input lines.
member.returns: A sequence of 2D objects storing the logical values. Each row corresponds to a channel in the acquisition task, and each column to a sample from each of the channels. The order of the channels follows the order in which you specify the channels in the property. Each sample can represent either a single line or a bitmask representing the state of all digital lines in a single port, depending on the configuration of the virtual channel.

member.name: M:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalInput.Generate``1(System.IObservable{``0})
member.summary: Reads an observable sequence of logical values from one or more DAQmx digital input lines, where each new buffer is emitted only when an observable sequence emits a notification.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements in the sequence.
member.param: The sequence containing the notifications used for emitting sample buffers.
member.returns: A sequence of 2D objects storing the logical values. Each row corresponds to a channel in the acquisition task, and each column to a sample from each of the channels. The order of the channels follows the order in which you specify the channels in the property. Each sample can represent either a single line or a bitmask representing the state of all digital lines in a single port, depending on the configuration of the virtual channel.

member.name: T:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalInputChannelConfiguration
member.summary: Represents the configuration of a virtual digital input channel in DAQmx operators.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalInputChannelConfiguration.Lines
member.summary: Gets or sets the names of the digital lines or ports used to create the local virtual channel.

member.name: T:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutput
member.summary: Represents an operator that writes logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines from a sequence of sample buffers.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutput.SignalSource
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional source terminal of the clock. If not specified, the internal clock of the device will be used.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutput.SampleRate
member.summary: Gets or sets the sampling rate for writing logical values, in samples per second.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutput.ActiveEdge
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying on which edge of a clock pulse sampling takes place.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutput.SampleMode
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying whether the writer task will generate a finite number of samples or if it continuously generates samples.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutput.BufferSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of samples to generate, for finite samples, or the size of the buffer for continuous samples.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutput.Channels
member.summary: Gets the collection of virtual output channels on which to write the logical values.

member.name: M:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutput.Process(System.IObservable{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Writes an observable sequence of logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.
member.param: A sequence of boolean values representing the logical levels to write to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.
member.returns: An observable sequence that is identical to the sequence but where there is an additional side effect of writing logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.

member.name: M:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutput.Process(System.IObservable{System.Byte})
member.summary: Writes an observable sequence of unsigned 8-bit samples to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.
member.param: A sequence of 8-bit unsigned integers representing the state of digital output lines in a local virtual port channel.
member.returns: An observable sequence that is identical to the sequence but where there is an additional side effect of writing logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.

member.name: M:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutput.Process(System.IObservable{System.Boolean[]})
member.summary: Writes an observable sequence of boolean samples to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.
member.param: A sequence of 1D arrays of boolean samples representing the state of a digital output channel in a local virtual port.
member.returns: An observable sequence that is identical to the sequence but where there is an additional side effect of writing logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.

member.name: M:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutput.Process(System.IObservable{System.Byte[]})
member.summary: Writes an observable sequence of unsigned 8-bit samples to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.
member.param: A sequence of 8-bit unsigned integer arrays representing the state of digital output lines in a local virtual port channel.
member.returns: An observable sequence that is identical to the sequence but where there is an additional side effect of writing logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.

member.name: M:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutput.Process(System.IObservable{System.UInt16[]})
member.summary: Writes an observable sequence of unsigned 16-bit samples to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.
member.param: A sequence of 16-bit unsigned integer arrays representing the state of digital output lines in a local virtual port channel.
member.returns: An observable sequence that is identical to the sequence but where there is an additional side effect of writing logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.

member.name: M:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutput.Process(System.IObservable{System.Int16[]})
member.summary: Writes an observable sequence of signed 16-bit samples to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.
member.param: A sequence of 16-bit signed integer arrays representing the state of digital output lines in a local virtual port channel.
member.returns: An observable sequence that is identical to the sequence but where there is an additional side effect of writing logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.

member.name: M:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutput.Process(System.IObservable{System.UInt32[]})
member.summary: Writes an observable sequence of unsigned 32-bit samples to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.
member.param: A sequence of 32-bit unsigned integer arrays representing the state of digital output lines in a local virtual port channel.
member.returns: An observable sequence that is identical to the sequence but where there is an additional side effect of writing logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.

member.name: M:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutput.Process(System.IObservable{System.Int32[]})
member.summary: Writes an observable sequence of signed 32-bit samples to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.
member.param: A sequence of 32-bit signed integer arrays representing the state of digital output lines in a local virtual port channel.
member.returns: An observable sequence that is identical to the sequence but where there is an additional side effect of writing logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.

member.name: M:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutput.Process(System.IObservable{System.Byte[0:,0:]})
member.summary: Writes logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines from an observable sequence of unsigned 8-bit multi-channel sample buffers.
member.param: A sequence of multi-dimensional arrays storing the logical values. Each row corresponds to a channel in the signal generation task, and each column to a sample from each of the channels. The order of the channels follows the order in which you specify the channels in the property. Each sample can represent either a single line or a bitmask representing the state of all digital lines in a single port, depending on the configuration of the virtual channel.
member.returns: An observable sequence that is identical to the sequence but where there is an additional side effect of writing logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.

member.name: M:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutput.Process(System.IObservable{System.UInt16[0:,0:]})
member.summary: Writes logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines from an observable sequence of unsigned 16-bit multi-channel sample buffers.
member.param: A sequence of multi-dimensional arrays storing the logical values. Each row corresponds to a channel in the signal generation task, and each column to a sample from each of the channels. The order of the channels follows the order in which you specify the channels in the property. Each sample can represent either a single line or a bitmask representing the state of all digital lines in a single port, depending on the configuration of the virtual channel.
member.returns: An observable sequence that is identical to the sequence but where there is an additional side effect of writing logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.

member.name: M:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutput.Process(System.IObservable{System.Int16[0:,0:]})
member.summary: Writes logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines from an observable sequence of signed 16-bit multi-channel sample buffers.
member.param: A sequence of multi-dimensional arrays storing the logical values. Each row corresponds to a channel in the signal generation task, and each column to a sample from each of the channels. The order of the channels follows the order in which you specify the channels in the property. Each sample can represent either a single line or a bitmask representing the state of all digital lines in a single port, depending on the configuration of the virtual channel.
member.returns: An observable sequence that is identical to the sequence but where there is an additional side effect of writing logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.

member.name: M:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutput.Process(System.IObservable{System.UInt32[0:,0:]})
member.summary: Writes logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines from an observable sequence of unsigned 32-bit multi-channel sample buffers.
member.param: A sequence of multi-dimensional arrays storing the logical values. Each row corresponds to a channel in the signal generation task, and each column to a sample from each of the channels. The order of the channels follows the order in which you specify the channels in the property. Each sample can represent either a single line or a bitmask representing the state of all digital lines in a single port, depending on the configuration of the virtual channel.
member.returns: An observable sequence that is identical to the sequence but where there is an additional side effect of writing logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.

member.name: M:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutput.Process(System.IObservable{System.Int32[0:,0:]})
member.summary: Writes logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines from an observable sequence of signed 32-bit multi-channel sample buffers.
member.param: A sequence of multi-dimensional arrays storing the logical values. Each row corresponds to a channel in the signal generation task, and each column to a sample from each of the channels. The order of the channels follows the order in which you specify the channels in the property. Each sample can represent either a single line or a bitmask representing the state of all digital lines in a single port, depending on the configuration of the virtual channel.
member.returns: An observable sequence that is identical to the sequence but where there is an additional side effect of writing logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.

member.name: M:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutput.Process(System.IObservable{OpenCV.Net.Mat})
member.summary: Writes logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines from an observable sequence of sample buffers.
member.param: A sequence of 2D objects storing the logical values. Each row corresponds to a channel in the signal generation task, and each column to a sample from each of the channels. The order of the channels follows the order in which you specify the channels in the property. Each sample can represent either a single line or a bitmask representing the state of all digital lines in a single port, depending on the configuration of the virtual channel.
member.returns: An observable sequence that is identical to the sequence but where there is an additional side effect of writing logical values to one or more DAQmx digital output lines.

member.name: T:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutputChannelConfiguration
member.summary: Represents the configuration of a virtual digital output channel in DAQmx operators.

member.name: P:Bonsai.DAQmx.DigitalOutputChannelConfiguration.Lines
member.summary: Gets or sets the names of the digital lines or ports used to create the local virtual channel.
